scripts.vercel-build: node -e "const cp=require('child_process'); try{cp.execSync('composer --version',{stdio:'ignore'}); cp.execSync('composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch(e){console.log('composer not found, skipping composer step');} cp.execSync('npm install',{stdio:'inherit'}); cp.execSync('npm run build',{stdio:'inherit'});"
